summary: Completed frontend testing of TEN MediaHQ new features: Generate Recurring Services, Tuesday Standup Attendance page with consecutive absence flagging. All 7 requested features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Services page (/services) - 'Generate Recurring' button visible and clickable
Services page - Generate modal opens with duration options (1 Month, 2 Months, 3 Months)

Services page - Generate modal shows all service types: Sunday Service (Sunday), Midweek Service (Leicester Blessings) (Thursday), Connected with PMO (Last Thursday), Tuesday Standup Meeting (Tuesday)
Services page - Generate functionality works: Generated 12 services for 1 month, count increased from 5 to 17

Services page - Service cards show correct types with proper badges: Sunday Service (blue), Midweek Service (Leicester Blessings) (purple), Tuesday Standup Meeting (orange), Connected with PMO (amber)
Attendance page (/attendance) - Page title: 'Tuesday Standup Attendance'
Attendance page - Shows member attendance table with real Envoy Nation names (Dr. Adebowale Owoseni, Adeola Hilton, Oladimeji Tiamiyu, Michel Adimula, Bro Oluseye, etc.)
Attendance page - Flagged members alert shows members with 2+ consecutive absences in red badges
Attendance page - 'Mark Attendance' button opens modal to select attendees
Attendance page - Mark Attendance modal shows all 23 team members with selection buttons
Attendance page - Mark Attendance functionality works: Successfully saved attendance for 2026-02-07
Navigation - 'Attendance' link visible in sidebar with ✋ icon
test_credentials: Demo mode - click 'Try Demo Mode' button on login page. No credentials needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working correctly. Generate Recurring Services creates all weekly/monthly services for selected duration (1-3 months). Attendance page tracks Tuesday Standup attendance with consecutive absence flagging (2+ absences triggers red alert). Demo mode uses MOCKED data for services, attendance records, and team members. Real team member names from ENVOY_MEMBERS and E_NATION_MEMBERS constants are used throughout the app.

generate_recurring_services.generation_result: Generated 12 services for 1 month, count increased from 5 to 17

mocked_apis_list: Generate Recurring (local state update in demo mode)
Mark Attendance (local state update in demo mode)
